questions.question: The Scottish sport of curling is typically played on a sheet of… what?
Born around 2609 BC, Khufu (or Cheops) commissioned which famous structure?
According to the 2026 Happy City Index, which Victorian city was ranked Australia's happiest and 16th happiest globally?
Which Dutch cruise ship was the site of a recent outbreak of hantavirus infection?
Dogs primarily see the world in shades of grey and which two primary colours?
According to the old jingle, who "… picks the fruit that goes to Cottee's, to make the cordial that I like best"?
Is the structure of a DNA molecule a single, double or triple helix?
Which Arabic word is used in English to denote civil attire (as distinct from a uniform)?
A first experience of anything difficult can be described as a baptism of… what?
Which character in the Star Wars universe is nicknamed "Baby Yoda" by fans?
What are the two official languages of Malta?
In the world of tech, what does "voicepilled" mean?
questions.answer: To have the realisation that AI-powered dictation is more natural and efficient than using a keyboard

questions.question: Kamay is the Dharawal name for which historically significant stretch of NSW coast?
In US politics, the Republican Party is also known as the GOP, meaning… what?
Imperial, Afourer and Sumo are all varieties of which fruit?
What controversial announcement did World Rugby make last month regarding women's rugby union?
questions.answer: The introduction of smaller rugby balls for women

questions.question: Which of the Five Pillars of Islam often requires a passport?
What is a noctivagant prone to do?
Which Australian band's hits include Sweet Disposition (2008) and Love Lost (2009)?
What was Alexander Fleming's original name for penicillin: "Fleming's cure-all", "the good stuff" or "mould juice"?
Kampala is the capital of which East African country?
True or false: jellyfish are a type of plankton?
In which country did Karl Marx spend most of his life: Belgium, England or Germany?
Which alcoholic beverage is typically used in an Old Fashioned cocktail?
"Talōfa" is a greeting in which language?
